items.title: Obsidian, silently fails, no errors, doesn't start the program
items.body:
## Describe the bug

Whenever I try starting obsidian, it doesn't error out or anything, just doesn't start the program, no GUI, no process in the background, nothing. Tried both `nixpkgs 24.05` and `unstable`, on `unstable` I am getting a similar issue when I use the `--disable-gpu`. Without that flag I get `ac: Unknown GPU` error.

AMD GPU and CPU, my [`hardware.nix` (alongside my config)](https://github.com/Nikola-Milovic/nix-tmp/blob/master/systems/x86_64-linux/workstation/hardware-configuration.nix)

## Steps To Reproduce

1. Install obsidian via home-manager in my case `home.packages = [ pkgs.obsidian ];`
2. Try and run it via the cli (or wofi, dmenu..)

## Expected behavior

Obsidian would open and start

## Screenshots


## Additional context

Tried running with and without gpu 

On `24.05`
```
~ ➜ obsidian --disable-gpu
2024-11-26 11:36:59 Loading updated app package /home/nikola/.config/obsidian/obsidian-1.7.7.asar
2024-11-26 11:36:59 Checking for update using Github
~ took 4s ➜ obsidian
2024-11-26 11:42:39 Loading updated app package /home/nikola/.config/obsidian/obsidian-1.7.7.asar
2024-11-26 11:42:39 Checking for update using Github
~ ➜ 
```

On `unstable`

```
~ ➜ obsidian
2024-11-26 11:47:03 Loading updated app package /home/nikola/.config/obsidian/obsidian-1.7.7.asar
2024-11-26 11:47:03 Checking for update using Github
ac: Unknown GPU, using 0 for raster_config
Cannot find target for triple amdgcn-- Unable to find target for this triple (no targets are registered)
~ ➜ obsidian --disable-gpu
2024-11-26 11:47:08 Loading updated app package /home/nikola/.config/obsidian/obsidian-1.7.7.asar
2024-11-26 11:47:08 Checking for update using Github
~ ➜ 
```


## Metadata

```
 - system: `"x86_64-linux"`
 - host os: `Linux 6.6.61, NixOS, 24.05 (Uakari), 24.05.20241116.e8c38b7`
 - multi-user?: `yes`
 - sandbox: `yes`
 - version: `nix-env (Nix) 2.24.8`
 - nixpkgs: `/nix/store/ly4s3hw35dd1c2vsd694y2715pc1d2c1-source`
```

## Notify maintainers
